B01:
Type: T0 — 稳定复现，空DB必500

追踪: ListActivities->db.Query->rows.Scan at activities.go:45. Expected: rows.Err() check. Actual: nil deref panic
分析: 根因: rows.Err() missing at activities.go:47 (conf:0.95). Counterfactual: add rows.Err() check -> 200 OK
修复: Add if err := rows.Err(); err != nil { return err }

B02:
Type: T1 — 竞态条件，每20-30次出现一次

分类: T1 依据: 间歇性出现，加print频率降低
证据: 10并发signup测试 -> 重复记录
追踪: Signup->SELECT COUNT(*)->INSERT at activities.go:156,205
分析: 根因: SELECT+INSERT窗口期 + 缺UNIQUE约束 (conf:0.85). Counterfactual: 加FOR UPDATE -> 0重复
修复: FOR UPDATE + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING + UNIQUE约束
验证: signup_concurrent_test.go PASS, 0 duplicates
记录: .fixes/20260621-signup-race.md

SCORE_CARD: T1|1|1|2|1|1
